workflow.name: Generate live cricket score commentary using SerpAPI, GPT-4o-mini, and Telegram
workflow.description:
## 📘 Description
 This workflow is a real-time AI-powered cricket commentary bot that continuously monitors live match data and converts it into short, expert-style insights. It fetches live cricket scores every few seconds, extracts key match details, generates commentary using AI, and delivers updates instantly to Telegram. It also includes fail-safe mechanisms via email and Slack alerts to ensure reliability. 

## ⚙️ Step-by-Step Flow
1. Every 10 Seconds Trigger (Schedule)
2.  Runs continuously at a 10-second interval to keep match updates near real-time. 
3. Fetch Live Cricket Score (SerpAPI Node)
4.  Queries Google for live India cricket match data using SerpAPI. 
5. Extract Latest Match Data (Function Node)
6.  Pulls structured match details: 
 - Team names 
 - Scores 
 - Match result/status 
 - Tournament 
7. Skip If No Match Result (IF Node)
8.  Prevents unnecessary processing when no valid match data is available. 
9. Generate AI Match Commentary (OpenAI GPT-4o-mini)
10.  Transforms raw match data into structured insights: 
 - Match summary 
 - Key turning point 
 - Best performance 
 - Tactical insight
 - Maintains expert tone and concise commentary style. 
11. Send Commentary to Telegram (Telegram Node)
12.  Delivers formatted commentary instantly to a Telegram chat using Markdown. 
13. Email Alert on AI Failure (Gmail Node)
14.  If AI generation fails: 
 - Sends an email alert 
 - Ensures manual follow-up 
15. Error Trigger → Slack Alert
16. Catches any workflow-level failures and sends alerts to a Slack channel for monitoring. 

## 🧩 Prerequisites
 • SerpAPI credential (for live scores)
 • OpenAI API (GPT-4o-mini)
 • Telegram Bot + chat ID
 • Gmail OAuth2 (for failure alerts)
 • Slack API (optional for error monitoring) 

## 💡 Key Benefits
 ✔ Near real-time cricket updates (10s interval)
 ✔ AI-generated expert commentary (not raw scores)
 ✔ Automated delivery to Telegram
 ✔ Failure-safe alerts via email + Slack
 ✔ Fully hands-off live match tracking 

## 👥 Perfect For
-  Cricket Telegram channels and communities
-  Sports commentary automation systems
-  Live score notification bots
-  Fan engagement platforms for real-time updates

workflow.name: AI-Powered Live Cricket Score Commentary using SerpAPI, GPT-4o-mini, and Telegram

parameters.content:
## 🏏 Live Cricket Score Commentator Bot

### How it works
This workflow runs every 10 seconds, fetches live cricket scores for India matches via SerpAPI, extracts the latest match details, and passes them to an AI agent. The agent generates a short, commentary-style match summary and sends it directly to a Telegram chat. If the AI step fails, an error email is dispatched automatically.

### Setup steps
1. **SerpAPI** — Connect your SerpAPI credential and confirm the search query targets your preferred match/team.
2. **OpenAI** — Add your OpenAI API key under the `OpenAI Chat Model` node.
3. **Telegram** — Set up your Telegram Bot token and replace the `chatId` with your target chat or group ID.
4. **Gmail** — Connect a Gmail OAuth2 account for error alert emails. Update the recipient address.
5. **Slack (optional)** — Link a Slack credential for the `Alert on Workflow Failure` node and select the right channel.
6. Activate the workflow and monitor the first few executions to confirm data flows correctly.

## ⏱ Trigger & Live Data Fetch
Fires every 10 seconds and queries Google (via SerpAPI) for real-time India cricket scores. Adjust the interval or search query here if you want less frequent updates or a different team.

## 🔍 Extract & Validate Match Data
Parses the raw SerpAPI response to pull the latest match — team names, scores, result, and tournament. The `If` node skips execution entirely when no match result is present, preventing empty AI prompts.

## 🤖 AI Commentary Generator
The AI Agent uses GPT-4o-mini to turn raw match data into a structured, expert-tone summary — covering match result, key turning point, standout performer, and a tactical insight. Edit the prompt inside the `AI Agent` node to adjust tone or output format.

## 📲 Deliver & Alert
On success, the formatted commentary is sent to a Telegram chat using Markdown. On AI failure, a Gmail alert is dispatched so you can follow up manually. A separate error trigger also posts to a Slack channel for any workflow-level failures.

## 🔐 Credentials & Security
Use named credentials for SerpAPI, OpenAI, Telegram, Gmail, and Slack. Never hardcode API keys or tokens directly in node parameters. Replace any personal emails or workspace IDs with placeholders before sharing this template.

parameters.text:
=You are an expert cricket analyst and commentator.

Analyze the following cricket match data and generate a short, engaging insight like a professional commentator.

Match: {{$json.team1}} vs {{$json.team2}}
Tournament: {{$json.tournament}}

Scores:
{{$json.team1}}: {{$json.score1}}
{{$json.team2}}: {{$json.score2}}

Result:
{{$json.result}}

---

Give output in this format:

🏏 Match Summary:
(1–2 lines explaining what happened)

🔥 Key Turning Point:
(what changed the game)

🌟 Best Performance:
(top player or highlight moment)

🧠 Tactical Insight:
(strategy or learning from the match)

---

Rules:
- Keep it short and crisp
- Sound like a real cricket expert
- No generic AI phrases
- Make it engaging (like commentary)

parameters.message:
=:warning: *AI Commentary Generation Failed*

The AI agent encountered an error. Please check the n8n execution log and follow up manually if needed.
parameters.subject: Error occurred in Cricket Score Workflow

parameters.content:
## ⚠️ Error Monitoring

Catches any workflow failures and sends alerts to Slack's general-information channel. Helps maintain reliability and enables quick troubleshooting.

Please check the execution log for details.

user.name: Rahul Joshi
user.bio: Rahul Joshi is a seasoned technology leader specializing in the n8n automation tool and AI-driven workflow automation. With deep expertise in building open-source workflow automation and self-hosted automation platforms, he helps organizations eliminate manual processes through intelligent n8n ai agent automation solutions.

data.details: In n8n, when a workflow execution fails, it can start another workflow. This second workflow can be any arbitrary workflow on your n8n instance. Use the Error Trigger node as your Trigger in the Error workflow.

generic.label: Creating Error Workflows in n8n

data.details: The Function node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow. Unlike the Function Item node, this node does not operate on incoming node data per-item. Instead, you must iterate over multiple items of incoming data yourself. This can be useful if you're performing data transformation where you want to manipulate the number of items being outputted by the node (i.e. 1 item is inputted in with nested object, 10 items are outputted without any nested objects)

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
